description.english: (Arcade) Reach Stage 16 in Main Course.
(Arcade) Lose your first life of many.
(Arcade) Reach maximum size at least 3 times in a single game.
(Arcade) Reach Stage 16 in Mixed Palette.
Encounter every type of boss.
(Arcade) Clear a non-challenge stage in under 30 seconds.
(Arcade) Reach Stage 50 in any game mode.
(Arcade) Cover at least 13 enemies in gum with a single bubblegum blast.
(Arcade) Use bubblegum to swallow a boss.
(Arcade) Swallow 3 bosses in a single game.
(Arcade) Clear a non-challenge stage without letting any food go to waste.
(Arcade) Fully destroy 10 Jelly cakes in a single game.
(Arcade) Clear a non-challenge stage in Main Course only eating one flavor of cake.
(Arcade) Eat a Coconut cake by coating it in bubblegum.
(Arcade) Defeat a boss with milk.
(Arcade) Use Earthquake cake to smooch a boss.
(Arcade) Bloat a boss by defeating it with Durian fog.
(Arcade) Clear 100 rounds of Fat Fleet in total.
Start a game with cheats enabled.
Play with Custom Sprites enabled.
(Arcade) Use Antimatter cakes to lose 120 kcal in a single stage.
(Arcade) Eat 4 Molded foods without losing a life.
(Arcade) Eat 300 foods without losing a life or reaching maximum size.
(Arcade) Fully burst 15 Sponge cakes in a single game.
(Arcade) Defeat Jiggling Jelly after swallowing 2 large jelly balls.
(Arcade) Defeat Boisterous Blueberry as a blueberry.
(Arcade) Reach maximum size within 90 seconds of respawning.
(Arcade) Defeat Caring Cheesecake with at least 2 Cheeselings spared.
(Arcade) Pop 50 bubbles that Idol Ice Cream spawns in a single stage.
(Arcade) Defeat Corpulent Coconut with coconuts without letting one hit the bottom.
(Arcade) Use more food to fill a bubble of gum larger than 120% GP.
(Arcade) Destroy 20 cakes in a single stage by shooting the ceiling.
(Arcade) Consume blueberry with extra dairy.
(Arcade) Defeat 3 bosses with milk in a single game.
(Arcade) Smooch 3 bosses in a single game.
(Arcade) Bloat 3 bosses in a single game.
(Arcade) Clear 5 consecutive stages without using REPEL.
(Arcade) Swell into an explosive size.
(Arcade) While Earthquake cake is armed, REPEL 5 times without activating it.
(Arcade) Eat 3 Durian cakes in a one game without respawning.
(Arcade) Remain clenched throughout the entirety of a non-challenge stage.
(Arcade) Reach immobile size without letting GP reach over 40%.
Encounter 3 character-exclusive cakes.
Defeat 50 enemies by bursting in a single game.
(Arcade) REPEL 10 times within 10 seconds.
(Arcade) Fill to the brim with fumes.
(Arcade) Defeat a boss while remaining clenched for the entire fight.
(Arcade) Use Caramel cake to devour a transformed boss.
(Arcade) Devour 3 transformed bosses in a single game.
(Arcade) Become a blueberry without any other flavor.
(Arcade) Inflate a boss.
(Arcade) Get inflated by a boss. (With help from SKU-11!)
(Arcade) Make Shifty Sponge absorb too much damage.
(Arcade) Cover blueberry cake in a splatter of gum in Main Course.
(Arcade) Destroy 30 cakes with bullets without missing a single one.
(Arcade) Hit a boss with 15 cleavage shots.
(Arcade) Reach immobility with extra milk 3 times in a Mixed Palette game.
(Arcade) After eating Durian, REPEL 20 times without respawning or GP maxing.
(Arcade) Reach Pump Punk's biggest size with a little help.
(Arcade) Destroy 16 cakes with one laser blast.
(Arcade) Defeat Vibrant Vanilla while remaining under her the whole fight.
(Arcade) Use GP to keep Chunky Chocolate's ground pound in the air for 5 seconds.
(Arcade) While fighting Sightly Strawberry, eat 18 foods before the fight ends.
(Arcade) Eat 2 Bubblegum cakes covered in bubblegum in a Main Course game.
(Arcade) Clear 500 rounds of Fat Fleet in total.
(Arcade) Eat 25 milk-coated cakes without respawning in a Watch Your Weight game.
(Arcade) Defeat the first boss of a game while flavorless.
(Arcade) Reach stage 12 as Sugar only eating one kind of fruit (besides blueberry).
(Arcade) Eat 3 Tres Leches cakes without being drained of milk.
(Arcade) Deflect 100 enemy bullets with parries without respawning.
(Arcade) Destroy 50 cakes weakened by Durian fog in a single game.
(Arcade) Catch at least 15 cakes with a single Caramel fairy.
(Arcade) Spare 3 Caramel fairies in a single game.
(Arcade) Inhale 20 bullets without spitting any out.
(Arcade) Inhale 100% of GP all at once.
(Arcade) Burst SKU-11 while near immobile size.
(Arcade) Spawn 3 distant helpers as Pump Punk without detonating them (yet).
(Arcade) Reach Stage 16 in Simple Taste mode without losing a life.
(Arcade) Reach Stage 7 in Rainbow Cake mode without eating Mold or Antimatter.
(Arcade) Remain at near-immobile size for at least 60 seconds.
Look in the credits!
(Arcade) Reach Stage 12 in Speed Eating mode without running out of time.
(Arcade) Defeat a boss with bubblegum in Heavy Duty mode.
(Arcade) Catch 30 bullets in Stage 1 of Cheese Mode as Phoebe.
(Arcade) Reach Stage 10 in Boss Buffet mode as Martha without losing a life.
(Arcade) Clench 20 times just after defeating a boss as Bella.
(Arcade) Change flavor 8 times as Sugar without respawning.
(Arcade) Defeat a boss by bursting a distant Punk.
(Arcade) Leave Fruitcake as the last enemy standing.
(Arcade) Defeat a boss with your pump at your smallest size.
(Arcade) Reach 500,000 points in a single game.
(Arcade) Defeat 4 bosses in a single Heavy Duty game.
